title: Mexico City paints record-breaking football mural ahead of World Cup
full_text:
Mexico City paints record-breaking football mural ahead of World Cup
Mexico City paints record-breaking football mural ahead of World Cup
Mexico City unveiled a mural spanning more than 200 square metres celebrating Mexico’s football history and culture, painted entirely with brushes and acrylics. The artwork earned a Guinness World Record ahead of the 2026 World Cup.
Published On 25 May 2026
